project.name: 雪山方舟
project.description: 数据库驱动、以高密度 Spec 对齐的 Managed Agents 完整中台

metadata.title: Agent 运行时与模型工具循环

intent.summary: 保持 Session、Tool 与证据契约稳定，同时允许替换模型和 Agent Runtime 实现。
outcomes: 确定性测试无需外部 LLM。
OpenAI-compatible Endpoint 通过同一 Policy 与事件面执行有上限的 Tool 循环。
nonGoals: 把当前自研 Harness 描述成与 Claude Agent SDK 或 OpenCode 功能等价。

adapters.label: 不调用 LLM 的本地确定性 Harness
OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions Tool 循环

features.label: 确定性无 LLM 验收模式
OpenAI-compatible 模型与 Tool 循环
Claude Agent SDK 或 OpenCode Runtime Adapter

limitations: Production currently has no model credential configured; the deployed acceptance Agent uses deterministic-local.
The bespoke loop does not yet provide the mature context management, subagent ergonomics and compatibility surface of a full agent SDK.

notes: Runtime adapters must never bypass Policy, Sandbox, Vault proxy or Session events.

assertions.assertion: Both deterministic and external-model paths emit the same event contract.
Replacing the model adapter does not change Session identity or workspace ownership.

items.source:
dsl: snowmountain.spec/v1
kind: component
metadata:
  id: agent.runtime
  title: Agent 运行时与模型工具循环
  status: partial
  owners: [agent-runtime]
  tags: [harness, model, tools]
intent:
  summary: 保持 Session、Tool 与证据契约稳定，同时允许替换模型和 Agent Runtime 实现。
  outcomes:
    - 确定性测试无需外部 LLM。
    - OpenAI-compatible Endpoint 通过同一 Policy 与事件面执行有上限的 Tool 循环。
  nonGoals:
    - 把当前自研 Harness 描述成与 Claude Agent SDK 或 OpenCode 功能等价。
knowledge:
  - docs/notes/anthropic-managed-agents.md
  - docs/notes/anthropic-auto-mode.md
specRefs: [session.lifecycle, sandbox.boundary, tool.resolution, credential.binding]
contract:
  role: replaceable-agent-harness
  runtime: bespoke-simple-harness
  adapters:
    - { id: deterministic-local, label: 不调用 LLM 的本地确定性 Harness }
    - { id: openai-compatible, label: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions Tool 循环 }
  ports:
    - { id: interaction, direction: in, protocol: durable-interaction-job/v1 }
    - { id: model, direction: out, protocol: openai-chat-completions-compatible }
    - { id: tools, direction: out, protocol: policy-gated-tool-call/v1 }
    - { id: evidence, direction: out, protocol: append-only-session-events/v1 }
  features:
    - { id: deterministic-mode, label: 确定性无 LLM 验收模式, status: verified, evidence: apps/api/test/api.test.ts }
    - { id: openai-loop, label: OpenAI-compatible 模型与 Tool 循环, status: implemented, evidence: apps/api/src/harness.ts }
    - { id: sdk-adapter, label: Claude Agent SDK 或 OpenCode Runtime Adapter, status: planned }
    - { id: context-compaction, label: Runtime 上下文压缩, status: planned }
  limitations:
    - Production currently has no model credential configured; the deployed acceptance Agent uses deterministic-local.
    - The bespoke loop does not yet provide the mature context management, subagent ergonomics and compatibility surface of a full agent SDK.
implementation:
  code:
    - apps/api/src/runtime.ts
    - apps/api/src/harness.ts
    - apps/api/src/mcp.ts
    - apps/api/src/policy.ts
  notes:
    - Runtime adapters must never bypass Policy, Sandbox, Vault proxy or Session events.
verification:
  tests:
    - apps/api/test/api.test.ts
    - apps/api/test/mcp.test.ts
  assertions:
    - { id: stable-evidence, assertion: Both deterministic and external-model paths emit the same event contract. }
    - { id: replaceable-runtime, assertion: Replacing the model adapter does not change Session identity or workspace ownership. }

metadata.title: Managed Agents 中台能力全景图

intent.summary: 用可审查的高密度投影向人类展示已验证、部分实现和规划中的平台能力。
outcomes: 进度来自结构化状态与验证证据，不要求人类阅读大量 Markdown 后自行推测。
nonGoals: 因为存在页面或路由就声称已经完整对齐火山方舟。

features.label: Session、持久队列、审批与事件回放
Credential Vault、显式绑定与 OAuth 刷新

limitations: UI parity does not imply hidden service behavior parity with Volcengine.
Runtime SDK choice, automatic Memory extraction and stronger-than-runc isolation remain explicit open contracts.

notes: 规范查看器是开发者投影，不是 Managed Agents 业务模块。

assertions.assertion: Partial capabilities are visibly distinct from implemented and verified capabilities.
The Managed Agents sidebar contains no SDD or project-document content.

items.source:
dsl: snowmountain.spec/v1
kind: component
metadata:
  id: control-plane.capabilities
  title: Managed Agents 中台能力全景图
  status: partial
  owners: [control-plane]
  tags: [ui, api, parity]
intent:
  summary: 用可审查的高密度投影向人类展示已验证、部分实现和规划中的平台能力。
  outcomes:
    - 进度来自结构化状态与验证证据，不要求人类阅读大量 Markdown 后自行推测。
  nonGoals:
    - 因为存在页面或路由就声称已经完整对齐火山方舟。
knowledge:
  - docs/notes/volcengine-managed-agents-reverse-engineering.md
specRefs: [session.lifecycle, sandbox.boundary, agent.runtime, memory.lifecycle, market.integration, tool.resolution, credential.binding]
contract:
  role: human-and-api-control-plane
  runtime: fastify-react-sqlite
  adapters: []
  ports:
    - { id: human-console, direction: in, protocol: https-react }
    - { id: control-api, direction: in, protocol: authenticated-rest }
    - { id: data-api, direction: in, protocol: bearer-rest }
  features:
    - { id: agents, label: Agent 与不可变版本, status: verified, evidence: apps/api/test/api.test.ts }
    - { id: sessions, label: "Session、持久队列、审批与事件回放", status: verified, evidence: apps/api/test/api.test.ts }
    - { id: environments, label: Environment 依赖与普通变量, status: implemented, evidence: apps/web/src/pages/Resources.tsx }
    - { id: vault, label: Credential Vault、显式绑定与 OAuth 刷新, status: verified, evidence: apps/api/test/mcp.test.ts }
    - { id: memory, label: Explicit Memory Stores, status: partial, evidence: spec/contracts/memory-lifecycle.yaml }
    - { id: market, label: Git-first Market integration, status: implemented, evidence: spec/contracts/market-integration.yaml }
    - { id: sandbox, label: Replaceable isolated execution backend, status: verified, evidence: apps/worker/test/worker.test.ts }
    - { id: runtime, label: Production-grade agent SDK runtime, status: partial, evidence: spec/contracts/agent-runtime.yaml }
    - { id: observability, label: "Audit, events and Prometheus metrics", status: implemented, evidence: apps/api/src/app.ts }
  limitations:
    - UI parity does not imply hidden service behavior parity with Volcengine.
    - Runtime SDK choice, automatic Memory extraction and stronger-than-runc isolation remain explicit open contracts.
implementation:
  code:
    - apps/api/src/app.ts
    - apps/web/src/App.tsx
  notes:
    - 规范查看器是开发者投影，不是 Managed Agents 业务模块。
verification:
  tests:
    - apps/api/test/api.test.ts
    - apps/worker/test/worker.test.ts
  assertions:
    - { id: honest-status, assertion: Partial capabilities are visibly distinct from implemented and verified capabilities. }
    - { id: viewer-separation, assertion: The Managed Agents sidebar contains no SDD or project-document content. }

metadata.title: Vault Credential 显式绑定与秘密解析边界

intent.summary: 消除“Vault 默认对所有 Agent 可用”的隐式契约，任何秘密使用都必须存在可审计的显式引用。
outcomes: Vault 只是 Credential 的加密容器，不直接绑定 Environment 或 Session。
模型 Credential 由 Agent ModelConfig.credentialId 显式选择。
MCP Credential 由 Agent McpServerBinding.credentialId 显式选择。
Environment 不接受 secret 变量，Sandbox 永远不接收 Vault 明文。
nonGoals: 把 Vault 内容注入模型上下文或 Sandbox 环境变量。

subjects.label: 固定能力引用的 Agent Version
可复现依赖与普通变量模板
不可信 Tool 执行容器

constraints.assertion: 除控制面 Credential 代理外，任何主体都不能同时持有引用和秘密；代理本身不进入模型或 Sandbox。

notes: 管理员级 MODEL_API_KEY 是独立的系统默认模型配置，不属于 Vault；选择 Vault Credential 时优先使用显式 Agent binding。

assertions.assertion: 删除被 Agent 模型或 MCP binding 引用的 Credential 会因依赖边被拒绝。
API 拒绝 secret Environment variable，Sandbox 也会防御性过滤旧数据。

items.source:
dsl: snowmountain.spec/v1
kind: capability-policy
metadata:
  id: credential.binding
  title: Vault Credential 显式绑定与秘密解析边界
  status: verified
  owners: [runtime-security]
  tags: [vault, credential, agent-version, environment]
intent:
  summary: 消除“Vault 默认对所有 Agent 可用”的隐式契约，任何秘密使用都必须存在可审计的显式引用。
  outcomes:
    - Vault 只是 Credential 的加密容器，不直接绑定 Environment 或 Session。
    - 模型 Credential 由 Agent ModelConfig.credentialId 显式选择。
    - MCP Credential 由 Agent McpServerBinding.credentialId 显式选择。
    - Environment 不接受 secret 变量，Sandbox 永远不接收 Vault 明文。
  nonGoals:
    - 把 Vault 内容注入模型上下文或 Sandbox 环境变量。
knowledge:
  - docs/notes/runtime-sandbox-memory-decisions.md
specRefs: [sandbox.boundary, agent.runtime, session.lifecycle]
contract:
  subjects:
    - { id: agent-version, label: 固定能力引用的 Agent Version }
    - { id: credential-proxy, label: 控制面 Credential 代理 }
    - { id: session, label: Session 运行记录 }
    - { id: environment, label: 可复现依赖与普通变量模板 }
    - { id: sandbox, label: 不可信 Tool 执行容器 }
  resources:
    - { id: credential-reference, label: 非秘密 Credential ID }
    - { id: vault-secret, label: Vault 加密秘密明文 }
    - { id: environment-variable, label: Environment 普通变量 }
  grants:
    - { subject: agent-version, resource: credential-reference, access: read }
    - { subject: agent-version, resource: vault-secret, access: none }
    - { subject: credential-proxy, resource: vault-secret, access: read }
    - { subject: session, resource: credential-reference, access: none }
    - { subject: session, resource: vault-secret, access: none }
    - { subject: environment, resource: environment-variable, access: write }
    - { subject: environment, resource: vault-secret, access: none }
    - { subject: sandbox, resource: environment-variable, access: read }
    - { subject: sandbox, resource: vault-secret, access: none }
  constraints:
    - id: reference-is-not-secret
      type: mutually-exclusive
      resources: [credential-reference, vault-secret]
      assertion: 除控制面 Credential 代理外，任何主体都不能同时持有引用和秘密；代理本身不进入模型或 Sandbox。
implementation:
  code:
    - apps/api/src/vault.ts
    - apps/api/src/mcp.ts
    - apps/api/src/harness.ts
    - apps/api/src/app.ts
    - apps/api/src/sandbox.ts
    - apps/web/src/pages/Resources.tsx
    - apps/web/src/pages/Agents.tsx
  notes:
    - 管理员级 MODEL_API_KEY 是独立的系统默认模型配置，不属于 Vault；选择 Vault Credential 时优先使用显式 Agent binding。
verification:
  tests:
    - apps/api/test/api.test.ts
    - apps/api/test/mcp.test.ts
    - apps/api/test/sandbox.test.ts
  assertions:
    - { id: explicit-reference, assertion: 删除被 Agent 模型或 MCP binding 引用的 Credential 会因依赖边被拒绝。 }
    - { id: no-environment-secret, assertion: API 拒绝 secret Environment variable，Sandbox 也会防御性过滤旧数据。 }

metadata.title: 雪山 Market 多来源 Catalog 集成

intent.summary: 方舟从可独立部署的 Git-first Market 实例发现带来源、分类、风险和版本信息的能力。
outcomes: 方舟消费经过格式校验的 Catalog Endpoint，但不拥有 Market 的源数据。
当服务器无法访问 GitHub Pages 时，本地生产镜像仍然可用。
外部 Registry 同步结果进入 Git 快照，运行时不直接依赖 ClawHub、MCP Registry 或 Wind 在线。
nonGoals: 在 Market 内替用户安装能力或保存用户 Credential。

endpoints.purpose: Capability discovery and immutable artifact metadata

health.success: HTTP 2xx with snowmountain-market-catalog/v2、sources、分类信息和 items 数组

contract.fallback: Serve the same Git-built static catalog from an independently deployed local Market container; never synthesize an empty catalog as healthy.

notes: Production uses an internal Market service because the current Alibaba host cannot establish TLS to GitHub Pages.

assertions.assertion: A reachable Market response declares the expected format and returns capability items.
An unreachable Market is rendered as unavailable with its endpoint and reason, never as not-yet-started.

items.source:
dsl: snowmountain.spec/v1
kind: integration
metadata:
  id: market.integration
  title: 雪山 Market 多来源 Catalog 集成
  status: implemented
  owners: [market, control-plane]
  tags: [market, git-first, catalog]
intent:
  summary: 方舟从可独立部署的 Git-first Market 实例发现带来源、分类、风险和版本信息的能力。
  outcomes:
    - 方舟消费经过格式校验的 Catalog Endpoint，但不拥有 Market 的源数据。
    - 当服务器无法访问 GitHub Pages 时，本地生产镜像仍然可用。
    - 外部 Registry 同步结果进入 Git 快照，运行时不直接依赖 ClawHub、MCP Registry 或 Wind 在线。
  nonGoals:
    - 在 Market 内替用户安装能力或保存用户 Credential。
knowledge:
  - docs/notes/google-open-knowledge-format.md
specRefs: [agent.runtime]
contract:
  provider: snowmountain-market
  sourceOfTruth: git-repository
  endpoints:
    - { id: catalog, purpose: Capability discovery and immutable artifact metadata, visibility: internal }
    - { id: public-viewer, purpose: Human browsing and installation guidance, visibility: public }
  health:
    timeoutMs: 5000
    success: HTTP 2xx with snowmountain-market-catalog/v2、sources、分类信息和 items 数组
  fallback: Serve the same Git-built static catalog from an independently deployed local Market container; never synthesize an empty catalog as healthy.
implementation:
  code:
    - apps/api/src/app.ts
    - apps/web/src/pages/Market.tsx
    - deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml
  notes:
    - Production uses an internal Market service because the current Alibaba host cannot establish TLS to GitHub Pages.
verification:
  tests:
    - apps/api/test/api.test.ts
  assertions:
    - { id: catalog-shape, assertion: A reachable Market response declares the expected format and returns capability items. }
    - { id: visible-failure, assertion: "An unreachable Market is rendered as unavailable with its endpoint and reason, never as not-yet-started." }

metadata.title: 显式长期 Memory 生命周期

intent.summary: 长期 Memory 是有来源的显式资源，不是对话历史的隐形副本。
outcomes: Session 创建时绑定零到多个 Memory Store，并读取其中当前条目。
在自动抽取策略被单独规范和审查前，写入只允许显式 API/UI 操作。
nonGoals: 自动把模型上下文 compact 当作可持久化的跨 Session Memory。

extraction.policy: No automatic Session-to-Memory extraction exists; a future extractor requires provenance, confidence, deduplication, privacy and human-control semantics in a new Spec.

contract.retention: Explicit entries persist until an authenticated deletion; Session event logs remain a separate source.

notes: Current UI supports explicit Memory CRUD and Session binding.

assertions.assertion: Running a Session interaction does not silently create a Memory entry.
Only Memory Stores named on the Session are included in runtime context.

items.source:
dsl: snowmountain.spec/v1
kind: data-lifecycle
metadata:
  id: memory.lifecycle
  title: 显式长期 Memory 生命周期
  status: partial
  owners: [memory]
  tags: [memory, session, provenance]
intent:
  summary: 长期 Memory 是有来源的显式资源，不是对话历史的隐形副本。
  outcomes:
    - Session 创建时绑定零到多个 Memory Store，并读取其中当前条目。
    - 在自动抽取策略被单独规范和审查前，写入只允许显式 API/UI 操作。
  nonGoals:
    - 自动把模型上下文 compact 当作可持久化的跨 Session Memory。
knowledge:
  - docs/notes/fable5-sdd-dialogue-reading-notes.md
specRefs: [session.lifecycle]
contract:
  entity: memory-store
  sourceOfTruth: sqlite-resource-memory-store
  writes:
    - { actor: authenticated-human-or-api, action: create_update_delete_memory_entry, condition: explicit_write_with_audit }
  reads:
    - { actor: bound-session-runtime, action: load_memory_entries, condition: memory_store_id_bound_at_session_creation }
  extraction:
    mode: disabled
    policy: No automatic Session-to-Memory extraction exists; a future extractor requires provenance, confidence, deduplication, privacy and human-control semantics in a new Spec.
  retention: Explicit entries persist until an authenticated deletion; Session event logs remain a separate source.
implementation:
  code:
    - apps/api/src/app.ts
    - apps/api/src/harness.ts
    - apps/web/src/pages/Resources.tsx
  notes:
    - Current UI supports explicit Memory CRUD and Session binding.
verification:
  tests:
    - apps/api/test/api.test.ts
  assertions:
    - { id: no-implicit-write, assertion: Running a Session interaction does not silently create a Memory entry. }
    - { id: explicit-binding, assertion: Only Memory Stores named on the Session are included in runtime context. }

metadata.title: Sandbox 与 Credential 隔离边界

intent.summary: 任何单一执行组件都不能同时拥有任意代码执行权和生产 Credential。
outcomes: Tool 代码只能在 Session Workspace 和明确资源上限内运行。
持有 Docker Socket 的 Worker 不能读取 Vault 或模型 Credential。
nonGoals: 声称 OCI Container 已提供与 microVM 等价的敌对多租户隔离。

constraints.assertion: No subject receives both credential access and Docker socket access.

notes: Current isolation tier is Docker/runc with network none, read-only rootfs, dropped capabilities, no-new-privileges, PID/CPU/memory/runtime limits.
A gVisor or microVM driver remains a replaceable higher-isolation execution backend.

assertions.assertion: Session IDs and workspace paths cannot escape the workspace root.

items.source:
dsl: snowmountain.spec/v1
kind: capability-policy
metadata:
  id: sandbox.boundary
  title: Sandbox 与 Credential 隔离边界
  status: verified
  owners: [runtime-security]
  tags: [sandbox, docker, containment]
intent:
  summary: 任何单一执行组件都不能同时拥有任意代码执行权和生产 Credential。
  outcomes:
    - Tool 代码只能在 Session Workspace 和明确资源上限内运行。
    - 持有 Docker Socket 的 Worker 不能读取 Vault 或模型 Credential。
  nonGoals:
    - 声称 OCI Container 已提供与 microVM 等价的敌对多租户隔离。
knowledge:
  - docs/notes/anthropic-containment.md
specRefs: [session.lifecycle, credential.binding]
contract:
  subjects:
    - { id: api, label: Credential-bearing control plane }
    - { id: worker, label: Sandbox Worker }
    - { id: sandbox, label: Ephemeral tool container }
  resources:
    - { id: vault-secrets, label: Vault and model credentials }
    - { id: docker-socket, label: Host Docker socket }
    - { id: session-workspace, label: One Session workspace }
    - { id: arbitrary-egress, label: Unrestricted network egress }
  grants:
    - { subject: api, resource: vault-secrets, access: read }
    - { subject: api, resource: docker-socket, access: none }
    - { subject: worker, resource: vault-secrets, access: none }
    - { subject: worker, resource: docker-socket, access: admin }
    - { subject: sandbox, resource: session-workspace, access: write }
    - { subject: sandbox, resource: vault-secrets, access: none }
    - { subject: sandbox, resource: arbitrary-egress, access: none }
  constraints:
    - id: split-privilege
      type: mutually-exclusive
      resources: [vault-secrets, docker-socket]
      assertion: No subject receives both credential access and Docker socket access.
implementation:
  code:
    - apps/api/src/sandbox.ts
    - apps/worker/src/app.ts
    - deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml
  notes:
    - Current isolation tier is Docker/runc with network none, read-only rootfs, dropped capabilities, no-new-privileges, PID/CPU/memory/runtime limits.
    - A gVisor or microVM driver remains a replaceable higher-isolation execution backend.
verification:
  tests:
    - apps/worker/test/worker.test.ts
    - apps/api/test/sandbox.test.ts
    - apps/api/test/policy.test.ts
  assertions:
    - { id: worker-auth, assertion: Unauthenticated Worker requests are rejected. }
    - { id: path-containment, assertion: Session IDs and workspace paths cannot escape the workspace root. }

metadata.title: Managed Session 持久生命周期

intent.summary: Session 是持久状态与证据，不等于一次模型请求或一个 Sandbox Container 的生命周期。
outcomes: 每个 Session 内 Interaction 串行执行，持久队列跨进程重启恢复。
被中断的副作用不会在重启后静默重放。
nonGoals: 在没有显式重试的情况下重建被中断的模型或 Tool Call。

invariants.assertion: At most one interaction executes for the same Session.
Every state transition is represented by an append-only Session event.
A job that was running at restart becomes failed and is not replayed automatically.

notes: SQLite WAL is the current durable queue and event-store implementation.

assertions.assertion: A queued interaction persisted before startup is drained after restart.
A Session reads the same workspace file after the API process is restarted.

metadata.title: Tool 来源与 Session 有效能力解析

intent.summary: 让人和 Agent 能明确回答每个 Session 到底能看到哪些 Tool，以及每项能力来自哪里。
outcomes: 内置 Tool 由版本化 Runtime Registry 定义，不由 Session 临时生成。
Agent Version 固化 Tool Policy、MCP binding 与子 Agent binding。
Session 固定 Agent Version，因此有效能力可重放且不受后续编辑污染。
permission=deny 的内置 Tool 不进入模型可见 tool list。
nonGoals: 把 Market 条目被选中等同于代码已经安装。

adapters.label: Agent MCP binding 运行时 tools/list
Agent Version 固定的子 Agent 委派 Tool

features.label: 内置 Tool 定义集中管理
deny Tool 不暴露给模型
MCP Tool 由显式 binding 动态发现

limitations: Skill 目前只作为 Agent Version 中的能力引用保存，尚未自动装载到 Prompt 或 Sandbox。
Market MCP 条目只表示发现与选择；必须形成含 URL、Policy、Credential 的 MCP binding 才能运行。

notes: 有效 Tool 集合是 Session 固定 Agent Version 与 Runtime Registry 的交集，不是 Session 独立配置。

assertions.assertion: 同一 Session 固定版本的有效内置 Tool 列表不会因 Agent 后续编辑而改变。
permission=deny 的 Tool 不进入模型请求。

items.source:
dsl: snowmountain.spec/v1
kind: component
metadata:
  id: tool.resolution
  title: Tool 来源与 Session 有效能力解析
  status: verified
  owners: [agent-runtime]
  tags: [tool, session, agent-version, mcp]
intent:
  summary: 让人和 Agent 能明确回答每个 Session 到底能看到哪些 Tool，以及每项能力来自哪里。
  outcomes:
    - 内置 Tool 由版本化 Runtime Registry 定义，不由 Session 临时生成。
    - Agent Version 固化 Tool Policy、MCP binding 与子 Agent binding。
    - Session 固定 Agent Version，因此有效能力可重放且不受后续编辑污染。
    - permission=deny 的内置 Tool 不进入模型可见 tool list。
  nonGoals:
    - 把 Market 条目被选中等同于代码已经安装。
knowledge:
  - docs/notes/runtime-sandbox-memory-decisions.md
specRefs: [agent.runtime, session.lifecycle, credential.binding]
contract:
  role: effective-tool-resolver
  runtime: agent-version-derived
  adapters:
    - { id: runtime-builtin, label: Runtime 内置 Tool Registry }
    - { id: mcp-dynamic, label: Agent MCP binding 运行时 tools/list }
    - { id: subagent-delegation, label: Agent Version 固定的子 Agent 委派 Tool }
  ports:
    - { id: session, direction: in, protocol: pinned-agent-version/v1 }
    - { id: policy, direction: in, protocol: tool-permission-map/v1 }
    - { id: effective-tools, direction: out, protocol: effective-tool-list/v1 }
  features:
    - { id: builtin-registry, label: 内置 Tool 定义集中管理, status: verified, evidence: apps/api/src/tools.ts }
    - { id: deny-filter, label: deny Tool 不暴露给模型, status: verified, evidence: apps/api/test/api.test.ts }
    - { id: mcp-discovery, label: MCP Tool 由显式 binding 动态发现, status: verified, evidence: apps/api/test/mcp.test.ts }
    - { id: session-projection, label: Session 有效 Tool API, status: verified, evidence: apps/api/test/api.test.ts }
  limitations:
    - Skill 目前只作为 Agent Version 中的能力引用保存，尚未自动装载到 Prompt 或 Sandbox。
    - Market MCP 条目只表示发现与选择；必须形成含 URL、Policy、Credential 的 MCP binding 才能运行。
implementation:
  code:
    - apps/api/src/tools.ts
    - apps/api/src/harness.ts
    - apps/api/src/mcp.ts
    - apps/api/src/app.ts
  notes:
    - 有效 Tool 集合是 Session 固定 Agent Version 与 Runtime Registry 的交集，不是 Session 独立配置。
verification:
  tests:
    - apps/api/test/api.test.ts
    - apps/api/test/mcp.test.ts
  assertions:
    - { id: replayable-list, assertion: 同一 Session 固定版本的有效内置 Tool 列表不会因 Agent 后续编辑而改变。 }
    - { id: denied-hidden, assertion: permission=deny 的 Tool 不进入模型请求。 }

features.label: 确定性无 LLM 验收模式
OpenAI-compatible 模型与 Tool 循环
Claude Agent SDK 或 OpenCode Runtime Adapter
Session、持久队列、审批与事件回放
Credential Vault、显式绑定与 OAuth 刷新
内置 Tool 定义集中管理
deny Tool 不暴露给模型
MCP Tool 由显式 binding 动态发现
